tests.name: webview/graphControls/filtering/structures builds folder and package nodes with default colors when overrides are missing
webview/graphControls/filtering/structures skips folder and package structures when those node types are hidden
webview/graphControls/filtering/structures treats missing folder and package visibility flags as disabled
webview/graphControls/filtering/structures suppresses all structural edges when the nests edge kind is hidden
webview/graphControls/filtering/structures builds only the enabled folder or package structural edges
shared/graphControls/nests/folders collects nested folders and the synthetic root when needed
shared/graphControls/nests/folders creates folder nodes with the configured color
shared/graphControls/packages/edges builds nests edges from the nearest workspace package to each visible file
shared/graphControls/packages/edges skips non-file nodes and files that do not resolve to a workspace package root
settingsMessages/updates/labels persists show-label updates and publishes them
settingsMessages/updates/filterPatterns stores filter patterns and publishes plugin patterns
shared/graphControls/packages/nodes creates package nodes in sorted order with stable ids and package styling
shared/graphControls/packages/nodes returns no package nodes when the workspace has no package roots
settingsMessages/updates/simple updates supported config keys and ignores unrelated messages
settingsMessages/updates/pluginOrder stores the plugin order and reprocesses the listed plugins
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls updates graph control config maps and publishes refreshed controls
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls updates each graph control message type with the matching config key
settingsMessages/updates/graphControls returns false for unrelated messages without updating settings
shared/graphControls/defaults/maps builds default visibility and color maps from the shared definitions
webview/graphControls/filtering returns a null graph unchanged while preserving edge decorations
webview/graphControls/filtering overrides edge decoration colors with edge-kind colors while preserving other decoration fields
webview/graphControls/filtering keeps structural nests edges hidden until the required folder nodes are enabled
webview/graphControls/filtering keeps folder-only rendering connected through visible folder nests edges
shared/graphControls/packages/shared treats file nodes and missing node types as file nodes
shared/graphControls/packages/shared rejects non-file nodes
shared/graphControls/packages/shared builds stable workspace package ids
shared/graphControls/defaults/nodeTypes declares the core graph node defaults
shared/graphControls/nests/edges builds structural nests edges for parent folders and files
shared/graphControls/defaults/edgeTypes declares the structural nests edge and the built-in edge defaults
shared/graphControls/packages/roots collects root and nested workspace package roots from package.json files
shared/graphControls/defaults/definitions declares the core graph node and edge definitions
shared/graphControls/nests collects nested folders and the synthetic root when needed
shared/graphControls/nests creates folder nodes with the configured color
shared/graphControls/nests builds structural nests edges for parent folders and files
shared/graphControls/packages collects root and nested workspace package roots from package.json files
shared/graphControls/packages creates package nodes with stable ids and package styling
shared/graphControls/packages builds nests edges from the nearest workspace package to each visible file
